rulings.Case Title: DEBORA SILVERMAN VS. MURPHY SAN FRANCISCO LIMITED PARTNERSHIP et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Leave To File First Amended Answer To Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, June 14, 2013, line 1 - DEFENDANT MURPHY SAN FRANCISCO LIMITED PARTNERSHIP, MURPHY INVESTMENTS, INC.,and BARTHOLOMEW MURPHY's Motion For Leave To File First Amended Answer To Complaint. Defendant's Motion for Leave to File First Amended Answer is GRANTED. First Amended Answer shall be filed forthwith. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DEBORA SILVERMAN VS. MURPHY SAN FRANCISCO LIMITED PARTNERSHIP et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, June 14, 2013, line 1 - DEFENDANT MURPHY SAN FRANCISCO LIMITED PARTNERSHIP, MURPHY INVESTMENTS, INC.,and BARTHOLOMEW MURPHY's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Defendant's Motion for Summary Judgment or Summary Adjudication is DENIED. Moving party failed sustain burden that as a matter of law response for to mouse infestation was "reasonable," and a triable issue of fact exists as to "reasonableness" of response. Objections to Slater Declaration are overruled for the purposes of this motion only. Additionally triable issue of facts exists as to facts #6 (Murphy Depo 118:22-24; 123:21-23; 138:14-15 versus Darsky Decl. Ex E MUR 414,482); #13 (SF DPH Depo 74:4-77:10 and Darsky Decl. Ex C. ex.3); #24 (Silverman Depo. 18:19-20:6, 227:3-9, 228:13-15; 256:3-257:2 versus Silverman Depo. 227:24-228:4). Also Murphy Depo. does contain competent evidence to support asserted fact #5; and Declaration of LeCue does not support asserted fact #68. Plaintiff's Request for sanction is DENIED: CCP 128.5 - not applicable since December 31, 1994; and no showing of compliance with CCP 128.7(c)(1). =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JUANITA ROBERTSON et al VS. GREEN TREE SERVICING, LLC et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, June 14, 2013, line 2 - DEFENDANT GREEN TREE SERVICING, LLC's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Defendant's Demurrer to Complaint is SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND to address all issues raised by Demurrer. On May 16, 2013 Court ordered Plaintiff to comply with SFLR 2.6B. Court received copies of only page 1, page 21 and Proof of Service stapled together. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6C in future. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PLACE OF FRANKS, LLC VS. P & T K PROPERTIES LLC et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiff'S Order To Show Cause And A Temporary Restraining Order
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, June 14, 2013, line 3 - Plaintiff Place of Frank, LLC's Order To Show Cause And A Temporary Restraining Order. Plaintiff's Motion for preliminary Injunction. Hearing Required. Moving party to produce evidence re: (1) Dismissal of Bankruptcy case; and (2) pay off confirmation. Contrary to assertions in Reply, there were no attachments. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. ETHEL MARTIN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Order To Show Cause Re: Compliance With Settlement Agreement And Modification To Settlement Agreement
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, June 14, 2013, line 4 - Order To Show Cause Re: Compliance With Settlement Agreement And Modification To Settlement Agreement. Order to Show Cause Re: Compliance with Settlement Agreement and Modification to Settlement Agreement. Hearing Required to address why Defendant should not be required to obtain help and clean up and/or why Plaintiff should not be authorized to clean up at Defendant's expense. Alternatively, why judgment should not enter. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: NADER HEYDAYIAN et al VS. DAVID FREEMAN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, June 14, 2013, line 6 - DEFENDANT DAVID FREEMAN's MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND. Defendant's Motion to Set Aside Default is DENIED. Defendant fails to sustain burden. Defendant presents no evidence in support of his motion. Proof of Personal Service by Registered Process Server on file. =(501/REQ)
